title: eranthemum album
intro: Eranthemum album, also known as the white coral plant, is a perennial herb native to the Himalayan region and Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eranthemum album include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
